content.en:
After understanding the situation here, as well as the strength of the Silent Annihilation Clan, Ye Tianyou was only dignified.

The strength of the Silent Annihilation is too terrifying, and it is very difficult to kill the Silent Annihilation, because once the Silent Annihilation is too badly injured, it can be completely retreated.

Moreover, the Silent Annihilation Clan can absorb the Silent Annihilation Energy during the battle, while these domain ancestors can't absorb the energy, and if they fight for a long time, they can't defeat the Silent Annihilation Clan at the same level.

In addition, their consumption was too great, and if they didn't have an entire Dark Forbidden Domain resource as a backup, they wouldn't be able to sustain such an endless battle at all.

"Wanfa Zhan Zu, your task is to defend this area, once the Silent Annihilation Clan invades from this area, as long as the opponent's strength does not exceed your limit, you can't escape, and you can't ask for help, understand?"

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded.

A few days later, Ye Tian flew out of the Sanctuary Continent and headed for an area in front of the space-time corridor.

There are a total of six Peerless Domain Ancestors sitting in this area, and the most powerful of them is the existence of the pinnacle of the Peerless Domain Ancestor.

But this Peerless Domain Ancestor Peak Being was not a cultivator, but a forbidden creature.

When Ye Tian came here and saw this forbidden creature, he was shocked.

He knew this forbidden creature with no superior domain ancestor level.

"Pengzu!"

Ye Tian called out the other party's name.

Before he became a half-step domain ancestor, the Xuanxu Holy Realm had not yet appeared, and the world at that time was called the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, which was not even as good as the domain realm, in a forbidden treasure land, Peng Zu's consciousness descended on a forbidden supreme treasure.

He fought with Peng Zu's phantom, and in the end, Peng Zu needed to see his high potential and passed it on to him to the Extreme Dao inheritance.

For him now, the Extreme Dao Inheritance is nothing, but at that time his strength was very weak, and the Extreme Dao Inheritance helped him too much.

Therefore, Peng Zu was kind to him.

"I've seen Pengzu!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Oh, look at your eyes, do you know me?"

Peng Zu asked curiously.

"Peng Zu, you once taught me the Extreme Dao Inheritance, do you remember?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Extreme Dao Inheritance?" Peng Zu thought about it for a while, and finally remembered Ye Tian, "Are you the little guy from a certain small realm? At the beginning, it was a little interesting to see you, in a place like the small realm, it was comparable to the genius in the Dark Sacred Domain, so I gave you an Extreme Dao Inheritance casually, I didn't expect you to grow to a peerless domain ancestor so quickly!"

At this moment, Peng Zu was extremely shocked.

He praised Ye Tian at the beginning, saying that Ye Tian had the opportunity to become an existence like him.

But that's just a joke.

At that time, Ye Tian's talent only made him a little interested, but I don't know how many people surpassed Ye Tian, and even some saints were born extremely demonic, but in the end, they couldn't break through to become a peerless domain ancestor.

Therefore, he didn't think that Ye Tian had a chance to become an existence like him.

If it was calculated by probability, Ye Tian was afraid that there was only a 1 in 100 million chance of becoming a peerless domain ancestor like him.

But now, Ye Tian has done it, and it hasn't taken long.

"At the beginning, Peng Zu's extreme inheritance laid a good foundation for me, thank you Peng Zu!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

"Hahaha, I'm just doing it!"

Peng Zu laughed.

Immediately, one person and one forbidden creature chatted for a long time, then they separated and returned to their respective posts, guarding this place at all times to prevent any Silent Annihilation from sneaking in.

The years passed slowly, Ye Tian had been guarding here for tens of thousands of years, and he had not encountered a single Silent Annihilation Clan, but there was a Silent Annihilation Clan in other places, but he couldn't leave here, so he didn't go to see the excitement.

this day.

When Ye Tian was cultivating, he suddenly sensed a special fluctuation.

"The Silencers are here, and it's a team of Silencers. "

Peng Zu's voice came.

Rumble!!!!

More than 20 Silent Annihilation Clans poured in, and the leader was a Six-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan.

The Six-Pattern Silent Annihilation Ancestor was comparable to the top existence among the half-step ancestors, and Peng Ancestor was far from being an opponent, once they rushed over, they would be finished.

Abrupt.

A figure appeared, it was a half-step ancestor who came over in time-King Kong Battle Ancestor, he was a half-step ancestor of the Holy Gate of All Things.

Bang!!!!!

The strength of the King Kong Battle Ancestor was terrifying, far surpassing the ordinary half-step ancestor, and he blocked the Seven Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan at the first time.

And Peng Zu stopped the two four Silent Annihilation Clans, and the other Superior Domain Ancestors each selected more than two Silent Annihilation Clans to fight, after all, they were small in number, and there was no way to do it, and the nearby Superior Domain Ancestors also came to support in time.

Ye Tian chose one of the Second Pattern Silence Extinction Clan and three One Pattern Silence Extinction Clan.

But when they were fighting, Ye Tian's copying talent shrouded them.

Annihilation: Chabai

Zufu: Strength

Zufu: Speed

Zufu: Defense

Zufu: Annihilation

Zufu: Time

Zufu: Space

......

Seeing such a talent, Ye Tian couldn't help but secretly exclaim.

With so many ancestral endowments, it's no wonder that they are so demonic.

He copied the area covered by his talents, and all the Silent Annihilators he found had these ancestral endowments, and they were all identical.

And the time ancestor, Ye Tian didn't have it.

These Silent Annihilation Clans do not have the ancestral endowment of the comprehension class, and it is estimated that the comprehension is not high, otherwise in the case of having so many ancestral endowments, they can all be as evil as him.

"Time Ancestor, I don't have it, now I can copy it directly!"

Ye Tian immediately copied the Time Ancestor Fu.

Moreover, he also copied the Ancestral Fu of Silence, although he didn't know what it was for, but there was nothing wrong with copying it in general.

As for the other ancestral endowments, he also thought about it and copied them all, what if they could be fused into more advanced talents in the future?

Rumble!!!!

The battle began.

Ye Tian didn't hide his strength, and it was useless to hide his strength here.

He directly cast the Eternal Immortal Ancestral Body, and also performed the Void Slash Ancestral Technique.

Immediately, his Void Slashing Ancestor Technique attacked one of the Silent Annihilators, directly annihilating its body.

"It's not good, he's an existence comparable to a top-notch Peerless Domain Ancestor!"

The Erwen Silencer said in horror.

One move kills a pattern of Silent Ancestor, only an existence like Peng Zu can do it.

They were careless, they didn't expect that Ye Tian's cultivation was not superior to the early stage of the domain ancestor, and his combat power was so terrifying, resulting in the direct fall of a Yiwen clansman.
